queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how a checking account balance below zero functions as a determinant of default and elevates credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of the absence of a checking account on credit default probability and its contribution to adverse credit risk outcomes.
Determinants of default associated with extended loan duration in months and their empirical role as a credit risk driver in consumer lending.
